titleStmt.title: SII 17.263: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 263. (A.R. No. 240 of 1904.) GINGEE, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Veṅkaṭaramaṇasvāmin temple. Sadāśivarāya. Ś. 1472: 1550-51 A.D.
The details of date given. viz., Ś. 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Mīna śu. Paurṇami, Friday, Tiruvōṇam, are irregular.

It records the following gifts by the king for the daily worship, special worship, special festival, car festival, various food offerings and other services including the repairs to the temple for god Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyāṉ in Śeñji in Śiṅgamporuda-vaḷanāḍu, the north-western hamlet of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam alias Brahmakshētram Eṇṇāyiram in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśoḻa-maṇḍalam.

The gifts were the palapaṭṭaḍai and śittāyam from the Tiru[vi*]ḷaiyāṭṭam lands of god Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyāṉ in Śeñji, the market toll in the Friday fair at Śeñji and the villages of Poṉpaṟṟi, Naraśiṅganallūr and Eṭṭiēndal in Peruṅkāñchi-śīrmai, Daḷavānallūr in Śeñjiśīrmai, Śuṅgarāyanallūr and Ka[ṟ]pai in Vīravanallūr-śīrmai, Kaṟpaṭṭu, [I]ṅgaṉā-paṭṭu and Kañchipaṭṭu in Tiruvadi-śīrmai, on the northern bank of river Peṇṇai, Maṅgalapuram in Dēva[nūr]-śīrmai, Kōṇai in Muḍiyarai-śīrmai, Kavaṟai in Vīravanallūr śīrmai, and Nallāvūr in Kayappākkam-śīrmai, purchased from the brāhmaṇas by Śūrappanāyakkar for the merit of the king and two villages of Aṇilāḻviliya-mahādēvi in Kuṉṟattūr-śīrmai, granted by aḍappam Mallappa Nāyakkar, for the festival of hunting expedition.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakābdaM 1000 4 100 7 10 2 mel cellāniṉṟa sādhāraṇa varuṣaM mīnaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣat=tu paurṇṇamiyuM śukravāramum peṟṟa tiruveoṇanakṣattiṟa nāḷ śrīmaNmahaāmaṇṭaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivate
vamahaārarāyar· vijayanakarat=til raknasiṃhāsanaārūḍharāy pṛthivirājyaM paṇṇi Aruḷukaiyil jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattil paṉaiyūr nāṭṭil rājarāja caturvvedimaṅkalamāṉa brahmakṣetraM Eṇṇāyiram vaṭamelpiṭākai ciṅkamporutavaṉa nāṭṭil ce
ñciyil tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ niṟṟapaṭi tiruvārātaṉaikkum viceṣa pūcai viceṣattiruṉāṉ tiruttertiruṉāḷ Amutuceytaruḷukiṟa tiruppoṉakavakai tiruppaṇiyāravakaikkum Aṅkaraṅkavaipokaṅkaḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum naṭakkattakkatāka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiṉa
śrīsadāśvatevamahārāyar· dārādat=taM paṇṇi samarppit=ta tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam kiṟāmaṅkaḷukku cilāśāsanam Uḷḷūr ceñciyil tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāṉa kuttukkallukku kiḻakkum nilapāṟaikku cūlakkal veṭ=ṭiṉattukku
teṟku mitukkuḷḷāka yirunta palapaṭṭaiyum cittāyamum ceñcikkuḷ naṭakkiṟa cukkiṟavāra cantai Āyamum peruṅkāñci cīrmaiyil poṉpaṟṟi kiṟāmam Oṉṟum naraciṅkanallūr kiṟāma moṉṟum Eṭṭi Ental kiṟāmamoṉṟum ceñci cīrmaiyil taḷavānallur kiṟāmam
Oṉṟum viravanallūr cīrmaiyil cuṅkarāyanallūr kiṟāmmoṉṟum kaṟpai kiṟāmamoṉṟum tiruvaticīrmaikkuḷ peṇṇaivaṭakarai kaṟpaṭṭu Iṅkaṉāpaṭṭu kañcipaṭṭu kiṟāma muṉṟum tevaṉār cīrmaiyil maṅkalapuram kiṟāmamoṉṟum muṭiyarai cirmaiyil koṇai kiṟāmam mo
ṉṟum sadācivatevamahārāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka cūrappanāyakkar viravanallūr cīrmaiyil brāhmaṇarkaiyil koṇṭa kavaṟai kiṟāmamoṉṟum kayappākkattil cīrmaiyil brāhmaṇar kaiyil koṇṭa nallāvūṟ kiṟāma moṉṟum tiruppāṭiveṭṭai
tiruṉāḷ Upaiyattukku Aṭappattu mallappa nāyakkar samarpitta kuṉṟattūr cīrmaiyil Aṇilāḻviliya mahātevi kiṟāmaM Iraṇṭum yintat tiruviḷaiyāṭṭa kiṟāmaṅkaḷ tiruveṅkaṭa muṭaiyāṉ tiruvārātaṉai tiruppaṇi naṭatti muṭittu Ācandrā
rkkasthāyi Āka naṭakkumpaṭikku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa cilāśāsanam Inta dharmmattukku yātoruvar Ahitam niṉaittavaṉ tiruveṅkaṭa muṭaiyāṉukku drokompu clearhiyumāyi taṉṉuṭaiyamātāpitā vaiyum taṉṉuṭaiya kuruvaiyum gaṃkaikkaraiyile vataitta to
ṣattile pokak kaṭavaṉākavum śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai Inta śilāsāsanaM koyilkaṇakku pirama nāthaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.263 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
